title: Cursed Potion & Scrolls (Cursed fate addon)
description: An addon for the 'Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate' mod that adds potions and scrolls which increase the stat levels (Lvl, CE, Innate, Melee, Weapon) from the mod.
body:
**Cursed Potion & Scrolls** is an addon for the **Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate** mod, specifically designed to streamline and enhance your character's progression. This mod introduces a variety of magical consumables that allow players to instantly gain experience and masteries to unlock their true potential. 

All potions and scrolls can be discovered as loot in any **chest** or **barrel** throughout the game world.

**Key Features:**
- **Magical Potions**: Three distinct tiers (Small, Medium, Large) that grant **Player XP**, **Innate Mastery**, or **Cursed Energy (CE)**.
- **Mastery Scrolls**: Specialized scrolls dedicated to increasing **Melee** and **Weapon** mastery levels.

**Note**: This mod requires the **Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate**  mod to function correctly.
